# Code Anchors: Concept Store

- `libs/portable-tools/src/validate-concepts.ts` — enforces the page schema: frontmatter completeness, the 400-word body cap, slug-as-filename, required sections, and the §8.3 rejections.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/generate-atlas.ts` — builds the derived human-orientation atlas from page frontmatter; `--check` gates atlas↔pages sync.
- `docs/concepts.md` — the generated atlas: the human entry point into the store.
- `.nexus/concepts/README.md` — the store's agent-facing rules and retrieval contract (not a generated index).
